__description: real: roots blocking new juniper planting
subject: root removal
body: Hi, We had to remove a large spruce tree and had the stump ground. Problem is that we want to plant some Junipers as a screen for our deck and the tree's old roots are in the way. Area is approx 6' long and you can see some of the new Junipers to the left of the photo. Would need roots dug out to accept new Junipers and debris hauled away. There's easy access from our neighbour's driveway. Photos of area attached. Thanks, [name redacted], 123 Test St NW, Edmonton

subject: Stump Grinding
body: Hi, I'm looking to get a quote for stump grinding. I tried using the website but it wouldn't let me send pictures. I have 2 stumps I want ground down depending on the price of the quote. Could you please provide me a price for removing the one with the fence in the picture and also a quote to remove both? Thank you [name redacted]

subject: Estimate for stump grinding
body: We had an oak tree cut down last month and need the remaining stump ground below grade. Can you send a quote for the work at 42 Pine Street?
